$comment: Pinned SurrealDB binary release. Bumped manually when kongcode is tested against a newer SurrealDB version. Per-platform sha256 verified against the GitHub release artifact.

embeddingModel.$comment: BGE-M3 GGUF Q4_K_M. Single download for all platforms (model file is portable). 420MB.
embeddingModel.name: bge-m3-Q4_K_M.gguf

nodeLlamaCpp.$comment: node-llama-cpp main package + per-platform native binding. Downloaded by bootstrap on first run when running under SEA (no node_modules available). Each <platform> tarball goes to <cache>/native/node_modules/@node-llama-cpp/<platform>/ so Node's normal module resolution finds it from <cache>/native/node-llama-cpp/.
